steps.title: Use the uncertainty clue
steps.content: The passage says people may have understood the cave paintings as art, but it is also possible they did not. The key phrase we simply cannot say for certain shows that the original understanding cannot be known.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: B means unable to be changed, C means expected, and D means agreed upon; none of those meanings fits the uncertainty in the passage. The blank needs a word meaning not known. The answer is A.
